name: negative_velocity_no_arm
description: current_return < prev_return so velocity is negative (price moving against trend). Threshold is positive. Arming must NOT fire on a drawdown tick. Pins direction: subtraction order is current - prev (not prev - current). A wrong impl that flipped the subtraction would compute +1.0 and arm on what is actually a drawdown.
derivation: velocity = current_return - prev_return = 2.0 - 3.0 = -1.0. should_arm = (velocity >= para_threshold) AND (not currently_armed) = (-1.0 >= 0.5) AND (not False) = False AND True = False.
